description_long: This object consists of a group of three woven baskets, each with a distinct shape and function. The largest basket is cylindrical with a vertical orientation and features a single looped handle at the top, ideal for carrying or storage. The second basket is rectangular with short, sturdy side handles, making it suitable for carrying or organizing items. The third basket is round and shallow with a prominent arched handle, reminiscent of a classic picnic basket, and has a reddish-brown interior. All baskets are crafted from natural wicker or rattan, displaying a tight, uniform weave with a warm, golden-brown coloration. The surfaces are slightly textured, with visible weaving patterns and subtle variations in color. These baskets are lightweight, open-topped, and designed for portability and practical use in urban environments such as parks or markets.
description: A set of three woven wicker baskets—one cylindrical, one rectangular, and one round with a handle—each featuring a tight, natural weave and warm brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical basket at the back, the round handled basket in front, and the rectangular basket with side handles to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the round handled basket in the foreground, the cylindrical basket behind, and the rectangular basket with its open top and handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rectangular basket's back, the round handled basket partially inside, and the cylindrical basket's side profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cylindrical basket on the left, and both the round and rectangular baskets to the right, showing their handles and open tops.
attribute_handle_type: One fixed looped handle on the cylindrical basket, two fixed side handles on the rectangular basket, and one fixed arched handle on the round basket; all handles are woven from the same material as the baskets.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with consistent spacing; the round basket has a slightly more open weave at the rim, while the others are uniformly tight.
